texto: I come from an artistic family. My dad's an actor, my mother's an actress, my sister's an actress. So I kind of grew up in that kind of environment. Oddly enough, I never really knew about my parents' work. I've seen small clips of it, but we never actually spoke about the business.
explicacao: Citação de Portia Doubleday sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I come from an artistic family. My dad's an actor, my mother's an actress, my sister's an actress…” articula familia, work, family em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e family.

frase_original: I come from an artistic family. My dad's an actor, my mother's an actress, my sister's an actress. So I kind of grew up in that kind of environment. Oddly enough, I never really knew about my parents' work. I've seen small clips of it, but we never actually spoke about the business.

texto: Growing up I did commercials and things like that, but nothing serious. As I got older, my family is really hardcore into academics. They weren't wanting to necessarily support an acting career; it's a really fickle business, and it can be difficult and unstable. They were rooting for education and the whole nine yards.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Portia Doubleday: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Growing up I did commercials and things like that, but nothing serious. As I got older, my family…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, family, business pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de business e support.

They weren't wanting to necessarily support an acting career; it's a really fickle business, and it can be difficult and unstable. They were rooting for education and the whole nine yards.

texto: I guess rebelliousness has been explored in many movies, but what about the smart kids' rebellion? Not just the motorcycle jackets and that kind of rebellion; it's the dorky kid - what could he do?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Portia Doubleday que provoca temas ligados a inteligencia. Ao questionar “I guess rebelliousness has been explored in many movies, but what about the smart kids' rebellion…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre inteligencia, smart, motorcycle, com foco em motorcycle e rebellion.
